text: Between 16/May/2026:13:12:03 +0000 and 16/May/2026:13:12:11 +0000, IP 45.155.205.91 launched a web application attack against the server, using the automated tool sqlmap (version 1.7.2). The attacker sent 5 request(s) targeting UNION-based SQL injection, boolean-based SQL injection (T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application)). Notable payloads included: /index.php?id=1 UNION SELECT username,password FROM users--; /products.php?cat=2' OR '1'='1. 2 request(s) were blocked with HTTP 403 by the WAF. PHP errors were triggered during the attack: Fatal error: Uncaught PDOException: SQLSTATE[42000]: Syntax error or access violation near '' OR '1'='1'' in /var/www/ht. This indicates the application may be vulnerable to SQL injection. This activity is consistent with automated SQL injection reconnaissance, likely attempting to extract database credentials or enumerate schema structure.
